svg.content:
<mxfile> <diagram id="architecture" name="Brasileiro Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="986" dy="840" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Brasileiro Architecture" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="20" width="320" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" value="React frontend + Django API + cloud score storage + offline PDF ingestion pipeline" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#555555" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="52" width="540" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend" value="Frontend<br>React + TypeScript" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="220" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" value="Backend API
Django + Django REST Framework
Session auth, song metadata,
pre-signed PDF URLs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="330" y="180" width="220" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sqlite" value="SQL DB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="390" y="350" width="100" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage" value="Backblaze B2 Bucket" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="180" width="170" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="processor" value="PDF Processing Engine" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="72" width="200" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="songbooks" value="Songbooks
Large PDF inputs" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="70" width="120" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" value="Flow:
1. Users sign into the React app and browse the archive through the Django API.
2. Django reads song metadata from SQLite and returns pre-signed PDF URLs.
3. PDFs are stored in Backblaze B2 behind an S3-compatible interface.
4. The processing engine runs separately to turn source songbooks into archive-ready PDFs and upload them." style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=#edf4ea;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;spacing=8" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="500" width="820" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" value="HTTP + session cookies" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10" parent="1" source="frontend" target="backend" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" value="metadata" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10;entryPerimeter=0" parent="1" source="backend" target="sqlite" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" value="list songs / get pre-signed URL" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10" parent="1" source="backend" target="storage" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" value="offline ingestion input" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10" parent="1" source="songbooks" target="processor" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" value="upload processed PDFs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=10" parent="1" source="processor" target="storage" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="780" y="146" /> <mxPoint x="805" y="146" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Flow:
1. Users sign into the React app and browse the archive through the Django API.
2. Django reads song metadata from SQLite and returns pre-signed PDF URLs.
3. PDFs are stored in Backblaze B2 behind an S3-compatible interface.
4. The processing engine runs separately to turn source songbooks into archive-ready PDFs and upload them.
